suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Manage the vendors you receive goods from
suppliers.emptyDesc: Add your vendors to track where received goods come from.
suppliers.searchByName: Search by name, VAT or email
suppliers.errorCreatingFallback: An error occurred while saving the supplier.
suppliers.failedToLoadDesc: Could not load the supplier list. Try again.
suppliers.deleteConfirm: This supplier will be removed. Past movements keep their reference. Continue?

stock.title: Inventory
stock.subtitle: View and manage physical inventory for all products
stock.registerItemBanner: This page registers individually tracked items (serial numbers). For bulk or batch products, use Movements to record stock changes.
stock.serializedOnly: Only individually tracked products are shown. Bulk and batch products manage stock through movements.
stock.emptyDesc: Stock items are physical instances of your products. Create a product first, then register stock items to track individual units, batches, or quantities.
stock.productsDefine: Products define what you track (name, SKU, tracking mode)
stock.stockRepresents: Stock items represent actual physical inventory at locations
stock.failedToLoadInventoryDesc: Could not fetch product stock data. Please try again.
stock.noProductsDesc: Create product models first, then track stock through movements or item registration.
stock.productsDefineProfile: Products define what you track (name, SKU, profile)
stock.stockLevelsCalculated: Stock levels are calculated from movements, batches, and registered items
stock.failedToLoadStockDesc: Could not fetch stock items. Please try again.
stock.deleteItemConfirm: Are you sure? This will remove the tracking record for this unit.

show.title: Item Details
show.movementsEmpty: No movements recorded for this item yet.

movements.title: Movements
movements.subtitle: Record stock receipts, shipments, and transfers
movements.hubDesc: Track inventory coming in, going out, or moving between locations
movements.receiveStockDesc: Record inventory arriving at a location from an external source
movements.shipConsumeDesc: Record inventory leaving a location (shipping, usage, waste)
movements.transferBetweenDesc: Move inventory from one of your locations to another
movements.directionHelp: Inbound = stock arriving at your location (receiving from supplier, returns). Outbound = stock leaving your location (shipping to customer, internal use, waste).
movements.reasonHelp: Optional note explaining this movement. Examples: 'Supplier delivery PO-2024-001', 'Customer order #1234', 'Damaged — disposed'.
movements.batchIdentifierHelp: A unique code for this batch. Use your supplier's lot number, your internal batch code, or any identifier that helps you trace this group of items.
movements.noProducts: No products found — create a product first
movements.singleLocation: Only one location available. Add more locations in Settings → Locations
movements.batchHelperText: Batch identifier groups items received together. Use your supplier's lot number or create your own.
movements.emptyDesc: Movements record when inventory comes in, goes out, or transfers between locations.
movements.inboundHelp: Inbound — receiving stock from external sources
movements.transferHelp: Transfer — moving stock between your locations
movements.hubEmpty: No movements recorded yet. Pick a movement type above to get started.
movements.failedToLoadDesc: Could not fetch movement log. Please try again.
movements.emptyDescNoProducts: Movements record when inventory comes in, goes out, or transfers between locations. Create a product first to start recording movements.
movements.productSectionDesc: Select the product model for this stock movement.
movements.productSectionDescTransfer: Select the product to transfer between locations.
movements.movementDetailsDesc: Specify the direction, quantity, and location for this movement.
movements.directionHelperText: Inbound receives stock into inventory. Outbound releases stock out.
movements.destinationHelper: The warehouse or store receiving this stock.
movements.sourceHelper: The warehouse or store releasing this stock.
movements.singleLocationPrefix: Only one location available. Add more in
movements.reasonHelper: Optional note for the audit trail.
movements.supplierHelper: Which vendor these goods were received from.
movements.batchInfoDesc: Provide batch-level metadata for this movement.
movements.batchIdentifierHelperTransfer: The batch to transfer from the source location.
movements.itemIdentificationDesc: Specify which individual item is being moved.
movements.itemIdentificationDescTransfer: Specify which individual item to transfer.
movements.serialHelper: The unique identifier for this specific item.
movements.serialHelperTransfer: The unique identifier for the item being moved.
movements.locationMismatch: Source and destination must be different locations.
movements.bulkDeleteAuditWarning: These records ARE the audit history. Deleting them permanently erases the trail of what happened.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage warehouses, stores, and storage areas
locations.failedToLoadDesc: Could not fetch locations. Please try again.
locations.emptyDesc: Locations represent physical places where you store inventory — warehouses, shelves, stores.
locations.virtualHelp: Virtual — for tracking in-transit or consumed items
locations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This may affect inventory associated with this location.
locations.deleteConfirmNamed: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This may affect inventory associated with this location.
locations.detailsDesc: Locations represent physical or virtual places where inventory is stored.
locations.typeHelper: Determines how this location is categorized in reports and movement flows.
locations.parentHelper: Nest this location under an existing one — e.g. a shelf within a warehouse.
locations.virtualDesc: Logical location — in transit, reserved, or on hold
locations.bulkDeleteCascadeConfirmMessage: You unchecked the safety guard. The bulk delete will also wipe every movement that points at the selected location(s). This is permanent and destroys audit history. Continue?

workOrders.title: Work Orders
workOrders.subtitle: Manage operations, assembly, and fulfillment
workOrders.orderNameHelp: Give this work order a descriptive name like 'Assembly Run #45' or 'Customer Order - Acme Corp'. This helps you find it later.
workOrders.purposeHelp: Templates pre-fill line items from a saved configuration. Useful for recurring orders or standard kits.
workOrders.assemblyDesc: Building a finished product from components
workOrders.kittingDesc: Grouping items into a set or package
workOrders.fulfillmentDesc: Preparing items for delivery or shipment
workOrders.productionDesc: Managing items for a manufacturing run
workOrders.addItemHelp: Select a product to add as a line item. For serialized products, you'll pick specific serial numbers. For bulk/batch products, you'll specify quantities.
workOrders.statusOpen: This work order is active. You can add or modify line items.
workOrders.statusClosed: This work order is complete. Items are locked and cannot be modified.
workOrders.statusArchived: This work order has been archived for record-keeping.
workOrders.emptyLineItems: Add products to this work order using the button above. You can add bulk quantities, batch items, or individual serial numbers depending on product type.
workOrders.emptyDesc: Work orders help you plan and track operations that involve multiple products. Create one to assemble a kit, prepare a shipment, or manage a production run.
workOrders.assemblyHelp: Assembly — collect components to build a finished product
workOrders.kittingHelp: Kitting — group items into a package or set
workOrders.fulfillmentHelp: Fulfillment — prepare items for a customer order
workOrders.hint: Work orders group items for operations like assembly, packing, or fulfillment. Add line items and track progress.
workOrders.hintExplanation: Work orders group products for operations — assembly, kitting, packing, or any task that involves collecting specific items. They don't move stock automatically; use movements to record actual inventory changes.
workOrders.failedToLoadDesc: Could not fetch work orders. Please try again.
workOrders.deleteConfirmList: Are you sure? This will not delete inventory, but will unlink it.
workOrders.noLineItems: No items in this work order yet.
workOrders.noMovements: No movements linked to this work order.
workOrders.fulfillConfirm: Discharge all items in "{{name}}" and close the order? This removes the quantities from stock and cannot be undone.
workOrders.completeConfirm: Are you sure you want to complete "{{name}}"?
workOrders.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive "{{name}}"?
workOrders.deleteConfirmNamed: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
workOrders.addModelDesc: Select a product model to include in this batch.
workOrders.batchDefinitionDesc: Optionally select a predefined kit model to auto-populate contents.
workOrders.templateHelper: Pick a kit definition to pre-fill line items below.
workOrders.workOrderDetailsDesc: Basic information about this work order.
workOrders.purposeInfoHelp: Categorize this work order by its intended use. This helps you find and filter orders later. Optional — skip if none fit.
workOrders.purposeHelper: What kind of operation is this work order for?
workOrders.descriptionPlaceholder: Internal notes, customer details, or special instructions...
workOrders.statusHelper: Controls whether items can still be added or removed.
workOrders.lineItemsDesc: Configure the items and quantities for this work order.
workOrders.statusOpenDesc: Active tracking — items can be added or removed
workOrders.editDetailsDesc: Update name, description, and status for this work order.
workOrders.bulkDeleteCascadeChildren: Also delete batches and assigned items (DANGEROUS)
workOrders.bulkDeleteCascadeConfirmMessage: You opted in to cascade. This will permanently delete every ProductBatch and PhysicalProduct currently assigned to the selected work orders, along with the movements that reference them. This cannot be undone. Continue?

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Committed stock: it stays in the warehouse but is not available for other outflows
reservations.releaseConfirm: Release the reservation for {{name}}? The quantity will become available again.
reservations.emptyDesc: Create a reservation to commit stock to an order or a customer without moving it out of the warehouse.
reservations.failedToLoadDesc: Could not fetch reservations. Please retry.
reservations.locationHelper: Leave empty to reserve at company level.
reservations.expiresAtHelper: When it expires the reservation is released automatically.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage the customers you ship goods to
customers.emptyDesc: Add your customers to attribute shipped goods to who received them.
customers.searchByName: Search by name, VAT or email
customers.errorCreatingFallback: An error occurred while saving the customer.
customers.failedToLoadDesc: Could not load the customer list. Try again.
customers.deleteConfirm: This customer will be removed. Past movements keep their reference. Continue?
